name: ghcp-dev-plugins
description: A cross-platform plugin marketplace for Claude Code and GitHub Copilot CLI

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Analyzes code for bugs, security issues, performance problems, and readability improvements

plugins.name: security-check
plugins.description: Scans code for hardcoded secrets, injection risks, and common vulnerabilities

plugins.name: make-skill-template
plugins.description: Create new Agent Skills from prompts or by duplicating this template. Use when asked to create a skill, make a new skill, or scaffold a skill.

plugins.name: commit-changes
plugins.description: Intelligently reviews git diffs and creates well-structured commits, automatically splitting changes into multiple logical commits when needed

plugins.name: gh-pr-tools
plugins.description: GitHub pull request tools — review PRs, resolve review comments, check thread status, and create PRs using the gh CLI

plugins.name: python-lint-fix
plugins.description: Runs ruff, mypy, and bandit on Python files to find and auto-fix lint violations, type errors, and security issues

plugins.name: test-gen
plugins.description: Generates pytest test suites from source files and tracks code coverage to identify under-tested areas

plugins.name: ci-pipeline
plugins.description: Generates GitHub Actions workflows, diagnoses CI failures from run logs, and helps add pipeline steps

plugins.name: release-notes
plugins.description: Generates changelogs from conventional commits, bumps semantic versions, and creates GitHub releases

plugins.name: scaffold-app
plugins.description: Generates convention-aware boilerplate for Django and FastAPI patterns including endpoints, models, serializers, schemas, Celery tasks, and test stubs

plugins.name: docker-compose
plugins.description: Generates multi-stage Dockerfiles and docker-compose configurations, adds services like Postgres and Redis, and optimizes images for production

plugins.name: design-doc
plugins.description: Generates RFCs and Architecture Decision Records from feature descriptions, maintaining consistent numbering and format

plugins.name: task-breakdown
plugins.description: Decomposes feature descriptions and GitHub issues into ordered implementation subtasks with file-level scope and acceptance criteria

plugins.name: dep-manager
plugins.description: Manages Python dependencies — add, remove, audit for vulnerabilities, and detect unused packages

plugins.name: incident-response
plugins.description: Triages production incidents, correlates errors with recent deploys, generates structured postmortems and operational runbooks

plugins.name: api-docs
plugins.description: Generates markdown API documentation from FastAPI routes and DRF viewsets, and detects drift between code and existing docs

plugins.name: ralph-wiggum
plugins.description: Autonomous coding loops that keep Claude working until real completion criteria are met

plugins.name: context7
plugins.description: Injects real-time, up-to-date library documentation into Claude's context for accurate code generation

plugins.name: playwright-skill
plugins.description: Browser automation — writes and executes Playwright scripts for end-to-end testing and UI verification

plugins.name: sentry-mcp
plugins.description: Error monitoring integration — query Sentry issues, traces, and performance data directly from Claude

plugins.name: microsoft-playwright-mcp
plugins.description: Official Microsoft Playwright MCP server for direct browser control, debugging, and test automation

plugins.name: deep-wiki
plugins.description: AI-powered wiki generator — creates structured documentation with dark-mode Mermaid diagrams, onboarding guides, and VitePress sites from any codebase
